rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Ah, Link! Your timing is as impeccable
as ever, my friend!

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I have not discovered any new hints about
your princess, I fear. However... I have
stumbled across something fascinating.
As I was diligently organizing texts
relating to the royal family, I came
across one of particular interest.
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>The content regarded a secret treasure,
and at once I thought of you. This seems
just your sort of thing! So? Intrigued?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>啊，林克！<unk[5:0]>你来了啊卓！<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>It is about nothing short of a <Color=red>secret
treasure<Color=white>! How marvelous, yes? Knowing
you, I take it you are intrigued?

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Ah, Link!<unk[5:0]> Thank you for coming to see me.<unk[5:1]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>啊，林克！<unk[5:0]>你来了啊卓！<PageBreak>第五位贤者……<unk[5:0]>米涅鲁的搜寻进展顺利吗？<unk[5:1]>
有我能帮上忙的就尽管提！
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>还是说，你对之前王族相关的书籍中
提及<Color=red>秘宝<Color=white>的相关记载产生兴趣了？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>喔，林克！<unk[5:0]>你來啦卓！<PageBreak>目前尋找第五位賢者──<unk[5:0]>米涅魯的過程還順利嗎？
<unk[3:0:259]>如果有什麼我能幫上忙的事，就儘管講吧！

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>おぉ リンク！<unk[5:0]> よく<Ruby={2:2}き>来たゾ！<PageBreak><Ruby={6:8}ごにんめ>五人目の<Ruby={4:8}けんじゃ>賢者…<unk[5:0]> ミネルの<Ruby={4:8}そうさく>捜索は<Ruby={4:12}じゅんちょう>順調か？<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Ah, Link!<unk[5:0]> Thank you for coming to see me.<PageBreak>How goes your quest to locate Mineru?<unk[5:0]>
The fifth sage?<unk[5:1]> If there is any way I can be
of assistance, do not hesitate to ask!
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Oh! Or perhaps you are here due to your
intolerable curiosity about the text I
mentioned regarding a <Color=red>secret treasure<Color=white>?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>哈哈！就该这样嘛！

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>那我们就赶紧切入正题。
文献中有一段这样的内容：
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>“大鱼雕像自古守护秘宝，<unk[5:0]>
而秘宝正沉眠其下。
抛却恐惧，<unk[5:0]>于延伸至雕像的长桥之下
穿过两道水帘者，即可领受秘宝。”
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>……怎么样？
听起来就跟寻宝一样吧？
不过，这本书籍相当古老，
所以这种<Color=red>宝物<Color=white>是否真实存在也很可疑……
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>不过，如果是真的，这秘宝或许能为你派上用场。<unk[5:1]>
你有兴趣的话，就去调查一下吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>哈哈！這就對了！

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>那我就切入主題吧，
文獻上記載了這麼一段：
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>「偉大之魚乃悠久的守護者，<unk[5:0]>
　秘寶正在其雕像之下沉眠。」
「在前往雕像的長橋之底，拋開恐懼，<unk[5:0]>
　穿越兩道水簾者，將獲賜秘寶。」
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>……怎麼樣？
聽起來就像是在尋寶對吧？
不過，畢竟這份文獻也非常老舊了，
所以那種<Color=red>寶物<Color=white>是否真的存在也很可疑……
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>如果那是真的，也許會對你有所幫助，<unk[5:1]>
你有興趣的話就去調查看看吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>ハハッ！ そうこなくっちゃな！

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:8}さっそく>早速だが その<Ruby={4:8}ぶんけん>文献には
こういう<Ruby={4:8}いっせつ>一節があったんだ
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>『<Ruby={4:10}ゆうきゅう>悠久の<Ruby={6:10}しゅごしゃ>守護者たる <Ruby={2:4}おお>大いなる<Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚<unk[5:0]>
その<Ruby={4:8}たいぞう>大像の<Ruby={4:6}ました>真下に <Ruby={4:6}ひほう>秘宝は<Ruby={2:4}ねむ>眠る』
『<Ruby={4:8}たいぞう>大像へと<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続く <Ruby={2:4}なが>長き<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋の<Ruby={2:4}した>下<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}おそ>恐れを<Ruby={2:2}す>捨て
2つの<Ruby={4:8}らくすい>落水をくぐりし<Ruby={2:4}もの>者に <Ruby={6:10}ひほうさず>秘宝授けられん』
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>…どうだ？
まるで <Ruby={4:10}たからさが>宝探しみたいだろう？
まぁ あまりにも<Ruby={2:4}ふる>古い<Ruby={4:8}しょもつ>書物だったから
そのような<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}たから>宝<Color=white>が<Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当にあるかは <Ruby={4:8}まゆつば>眉唾ものだが…
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:8}しんじつ>真実なら キミの<Ruby={2:4}やく>役に<Ruby={2:2}た>立つかもしれん<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:2}き>気になったら <Ruby={2:4}しら>調べてみてくれ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>You never disappoint, do you? Yes,
this is just what I expected of my
dearest companion!
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>In that case, I shall let you in on the
mystery. There was a passage in the text
I mentioned that went as follows...
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>"The great fish. The eternal guardian.<unk[5:0]>
A secret treasure awaits just beneath
the stony form of its statue.
"Below the long bridge that reaches for
the statue, leave your fears behind. <unk[5:0]>Pass
beneath two waterfalls to find your prize."
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>So! What do you make of it? It is like a
good, old-fashioned treasure hunt,
is it not?
That said, it was a very old book, so it is
questionable whether that <Color=red>secret treasure<Color=white>
is still there, or ever was.
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>However, if there is truth in those ancient
words, this treasure may be of use to you.<unk[5:1]>
If you see fit, I encourage you to seek it!

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>I see...<unk[5:0]> Well, I am sure you have your
reasons! If you ever feel so inclined,
I would be happy to share my findings.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>对了！<unk[5:1]>还有另外一件事……<PageBreak>最近，我在卓拉王族相关的书籍中
找到了一段令人在意的记载……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>这段记载似乎和秘宝有关，
说不定能派上些用场，你有兴趣吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>對了！<unk[5:1]>還有另一件事……<PageBreak>我最近在有關卓拉王族的書籍中，
發現了一篇令人在意的文獻……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>上面似乎記載著關於秘寶的情報，
我想或許能派上用場，你有沒有興趣？
rows.JPja:

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>“大鱼雕像自古守护秘宝，<unk[5:0]>
而秘宝正沉眠其下。
抛却恐惧，<unk[5:0]>于延伸至雕像的长桥之下
穿过两道水帘者，即可领受秘宝。”
<unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>真是一段神秘的文字……<unk[5:1]>
首先<unk[5:0]>得弄清楚“大鱼”是指什么。
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 83 104 105 100 111 65 105 122 117 99 104 105 95 48 48]>如果<Color=red>秘宝<Color=white>什么的真的存在，
或许它能为你派上用场。
你有兴趣的话，就去调查一下吧。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>「偉大之魚乃悠久的守護者，<unk[5:0]>
　秘寶正在其雕像之下沉眠。」
「在前往雕像的長橋之底，<unk[5:0]>拋開恐懼，
　穿越兩道水簾者，將獲賜秘寶。」
<unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>真是份神秘的文獻……<unk[5:1]>
偉大之魚是指什麼呢……<unk[5:0]>
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 83 104 105 100 111 65 105 122 117 99 104 105 95 48 48]>如果<Color=red>秘寶<Color=white>真的存在，
也許會對你有幫助。
你有興趣的話就去調查看看吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>『<Ruby={4:10}ゆうきゅう>悠久の<Ruby={6:10}しゅごしゃ>守護者たる <Ruby={2:4}おお>大いなる<Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚<unk[5:0]>
その<Ruby={4:8}たいぞう>大像の<Ruby={4:6}ました>真下に <Ruby={4:6}ひほう>秘宝は<Ruby={2:4}ねむ>眠る』
『<Ruby={4:8}たいぞう>大像へと<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続く <Ruby={2:4}なが>長き<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋の<Ruby={2:4}した>下<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}おそ>恐れを<Ruby={2:2}す>捨て
2つの<Ruby={4:8}らくすい>落水をくぐりし<Ruby={2:4}もの>者に <Ruby={6:10}ひほうさず>秘宝授けられん』
<unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}なぞ>謎めいた<Ruby={4:10}ぶんしょう>文章だが…<unk[5:1]>
まずは <Ruby={2:4}おお>大いなる<Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚が<Ruby={2:4}なん>何なのか<unk[5:0]> だな
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 83 104 105 100 111 65 105 122 117 99 104 105 95 48 48]><Color=red><Ruby={4:6}ひほう>秘宝<Color=white>とやらが <Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当にあるのなら

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>"The great fish. The eternal guardian.<unk[5:0]>
A secret treasure awaits just beneath
the stony form of its statue.
"Below the long bridge that reaches for
the statue, leave your fears behind. <unk[5:0]>Pass
beneath two waterfalls to find your prize."
<unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>Ah, the mystery of it all! <unk[5:1]>The first step,
I would dare to venture, <unk[5:0]>is to determine
what "the great fish" is referring to.
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 83 104 105 100 111 65 105 122 117 99 104 105 95 48 48]>If there is truth in those ancient words,
this <Color=red>secret treasure<Color=white> may be of use to you.
If you see fit, I encourage you to seek it!
